title: NÚKIB portal now supports quantum-resistant cryptography
summary: Announcement by the Czech National Cyber and Information Security Agency that its portal now supports quantum-resistant cryptography, and setting out expectations for when post-quantum cryptography should be deployed for sensitive information of critical confidentiality in higher-risk environments.

title: The quantum threat and quantum-resistant cryptography (minimum requirements appendix)
summary: Official NÚKIB document (appendix to minimum requirements) explaining the quantum threat and quantum-resistant (post-quantum) cryptography, including the origins and definition of post-quantum asymmetric algorithms.

title: National Cyber Security Strategy 2026-2030
summary: Czech national cyber security strategy for 2026-2030, which identifies emerging disruptive technologies including artificial intelligence and post-quantum cryptography as means to strengthen cyber security.

title: Czech research mission to Taiwan strengthens cooperation in cybersecurity
summary: NÚKIB news item on a Czech research mission to Taiwan whose discussions covered quantum key distribution, post-quantum cryptography, and the use of artificial intelligence in cybersecurity. Flagged for review as the PQC reference is one topic in a diplomatic mission readout rather than the document's substance.

title: Analysis of investment options in further asset classes: Part I, digital assets
summary: Czech National Bank (central bank) research analysis on investment in digital assets which notes the quantum threat and discusses quantum-resistant signature schemes (post-quantum cryptography). Flagged for review as the PQC mention is incidental to a financial-research paper rather than a dedicated QSC document.
